name: detectConflicts
invariants: output.ok !== true || output.result.message !== undefined || (Array.isArray(output.result.conflicts) && Number.isFinite(output.result.conflictCount) && typeof output.result.conflictFree === 'boolean')
_note: calendar.detectConflicts is a LENS_ACTIONS (PATH 3) handler reading events from artifact.data.events. It sorts events by start, finds pairwise overlaps (touching boundaries end==start do NOT count), and reports exact overlapMinutes per conflict; a missing end defaults to start+1h. <2 events returns a guidance message (no conflict array). Pure-compute, no STATE/DB/network — works even when globalThis._concordSTATE is absent. macro-assassin drives runMacro (which does not resolve LENS_ACTIONS), so this contract documents the /api/lens/run path the lens uses; the behavioral suite is the real driver. No side effects.
